title: Erythrostemon placidus
taxonomy: Erythrostemon placidus is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant belongs to the genus Erythrostemon, which is part of the larger Legume family. The classification of Erythrostemon placidus is further divided into its kingdom, phylum, class, order, family, genus, and species levels. The exact classification levels of Erythrostemon placidus are as follows: kingdom: Plantae, phylum: Magnoliophyta, class: Magnoliopsida, order: Fabales, family: Fabaceae, genus: Erythrostemon, and species: E. placidus.
